summary: RTL Layout Testing Complete - All tests PASSED. Verified Arabic RTL layout on Forms, Quotations, and Contracts tabs. Action buttons correctly positioned on LEFT and data columns on RIGHT in Arabic mode. English LTR mode also working correctly with opposite layout.
critical_code_review_comments: DataTable.js uses dir='rtl' attribute on table body and header (lines 248-249, 273) - correct approach using native browser RTL support
Actions column has dir='ltr' to maintain consistent button order (AdminDashboard.js lines 537, 773, 982) - correct implementation
Row cells use text-start class which automatically adjusts based on dir attribute - proper CSS logical property usage
context_for_next_testing_agent: RTL layout verified working correctly. The fix uses native dir attribute instead of flex-row-reverse classes. All three main tabs (Forms, Quotations, Contracts) display correctly in both Arabic RTL and English LTR modes.
test_methodology: Used Playwright browser automation to verify dir attribute on table-body elements and visual inspection of column positions via screenshots
